class.description: [Legacy] BFS-based frontier detection on the Nav2 global costmap. Outputs a list of clustered frontier candidates on the blackboard. Superseded by SearchFrontiersNode + WavefrontFrontierDetector plugin.

[Legacy] Scores each frontier using: score = alpha * info_gain - beta * cost. Uses A* on the costmap for traversal cost and unknown-cell counting for information gain. Superseded by AssignCostsNode + InformationGainPlugin + EuclideanPlugin.
[Legacy] Orders scored frontiers with a greedy nearest-neighbour heuristic and applies hysteresis before emitting the next NavigateToPose goal. Superseded by SelectFrontierNode.
Condition node that returns SUCCESS every N iterations (N derived from coverage_task_ratio) to trigger a camera-coverage step.
Picks the next wall-facing camera-coverage waypoint from the occupancy grid and outputs it as a NavigateToPose goal.
